strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder experience building and operating an open-source platform end-to-end
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP tooling, and agentic workflows
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at scale
Title history is Senior/Staff IC; limited evidence of director-level strategic influence
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited large-cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Strategic leadership scope at director level

response.justification: The candidate brings a broad, hands-on engineering background spanning full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure work, with recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks. However, the role targets a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the resume shows limited evidence of strategic AI platform leadership, large-scale cloud strategy, or advising strategic customers at that altitude.
